message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam ParticipantPadding 25
skinparam BoxPadding 10

actor Administrator

participant ":SpecifyNewVaccineUI" as UI
participant ":SpecifyNewVaccineController" as C
participant ":Company" as Company
participant ":VaccineStore" as Store
participant "v:Vaccine" as V
participant "admPro:AdministrationProcess" as AdmPro
participant ":VaccineTypeStore" as VTS
participant ":VaccineType" as VT

Administrator -> UI : 1 starts specifying a new vaccine and its administration process
UI -> UI : 2 createVaccine()
UI -> C : 3 typeList = getVaccineTypeList()
C -> Company : 4 getVaccineTypeList()

loop for all known vaccineTypes
  Company -> VTS : 5 v:VaccineType(code,name)
  VTS -> VT : 6 v:VaccineType(code,name)
end

UI -> Administrator : 6 requests data (name, manufacturer, type, age groups,doses,elapsing interval, dosage and show vaccineType list)
Administrator -> UI : 7 types requested data

UI -> UI : 8 createVaccine(id,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)
UI -> C : 9 createVaccine(id,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)
C -> Company : 10 createVaccine(id,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)
Company -> Store : 11 v = createVaccine(id,name,manufacturer,type,administrationProcess)

loop for all age groups
  Store -> V : 12 administrationProcess(minAge,maxAge,numberOfDoses,dosage,timeElapsed)
  V -> AdmPro : 13 validateVaccine()
end

Store -> Store : 14 validateVaccine()

UI -> Administrator : 15 shows data and request confirmation
Administrator -> UI : 16 confirms data

UI -> UI : 17 saveVaccine()
UI -> C : 18 saveVaccine()
C -> Company : 19 saveVaccine()
Company -> Store : 20 addVaccine(v)

UI -> Administrator : 21 informs operation (in)success
@enduml
